mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hr_employee_follow_up ( employee_number, employee_name, status, follow_date, follow_content, follow_result, job_transfer, salary_adjust_time, salary_adjust_reason, salary_adjust_doc_old, position_adjust_doc_old, business_data_doc_old, salary_adjust_doc, position_adjust_doc, business_data_doc, regular_notice_doc, communication_follow_doc, event_type, create_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeNumber}, #{employeeName}, #{status}, #{followDate}, #{followContent}, #{followResult}, #{jobTransfer}, #{salaryAdjustTime}, #{salaryAdjustReason}, #{salaryAdjustDocOld}, #{positionAdjustDocOld}, #{businessDataDocOld}, #{salaryAdjustDoc}, #{positionAdjustDoc}, #{businessDataDoc}, #{regularNoticeDoc}, #{communicationFollowDoc}, #{eventType}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE hr_employee_follow_up SET employee_name = #{employeeName}, status = #{status}, follow_date = #{followDate}, follow_content = #{followContent}, follow_result = #{followResult}, job_transfer = #{jobTransfer}, salary_adjust_time = #{salaryAdjustTime}, salary_adjust_reason = #{salaryAdjustReason}, salary_adjust_doc_old = #{salaryAdjustDocOld}, position_adjust_doc_old = #{positionAdjustDocOld}, business_data_doc_old = #{businessDataDocOld}, salary_adjust_doc = #{salaryAdjustDoc}, position_adjust_doc = #{positionAdjustDoc}, business_data_doc = #{businessDataDoc}, regular_notice_doc = #{regularNoticeDoc}, communication_follow_doc = #{communicationFollowDoc}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM hr_employee_follow_up WHERE employee_number = #{employeeNumber} LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT employee_number FROM hr_employee_follow_up WHERE employee_number IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO hr_employee_follow_up ( employee_number, employee_name, status, follow_date, follow_content, follow_result, job_transfer, salary_adjust_time, salary_adjust_reason, salary_adjust_doc_old, position_adjust_doc_old, business_data_doc_old, salary_adjust_doc, position_adjust_doc, business_data_doc, regular_notice_doc, communication_follow_doc, event_type, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.employeeNumber}, #{item.employeeName}, #{item.status}, #{item.followDate}, #{item.followContent}, #{item.followResult}, #{item.jobTransfer}, #{item.salaryAdjustTime}, #{item.salaryAdjustReason}, #{item.salaryAdjustDocOld}, #{item.positionAdjustDocOld}, #{item.businessDataDocOld}, #{item.salaryAdjustDoc}, #{item.positionAdjustDoc}, #{item.businessDataDoc}, #{item.regularNoticeDoc}, #{item.communicationFollowDoc}, #{item.eventType}, NOW() )

update.foreach: UPDATE hr_employee_follow_up SET employee_name = #{item.employeeName}, status = #{item.status}, follow_date = #{item.followDate}, follow_content = #{item.followContent}, follow_result = #{item.followResult}, job_transfer = #{item.jobTransfer}, salary_adjust_time = #{item.salaryAdjustTime}, salary_adjust_reason = #{item.salaryAdjustReason}, salary_adjust_doc_old = #{item.salaryAdjustDocOld}, position_adjust_doc_old = #{item.positionAdjustDocOld}, business_data_doc_old = #{item.businessDataDocOld}, salary_adjust_doc = #{item.salaryAdjustDoc}, position_adjust_doc = #{item.positionAdjustDoc}, business_data_doc = #{item.businessDataDoc}, regular_notice_doc = #{item.regularNoticeDoc}, communication_follow_doc = #{item.communicationFollowDoc}, update_time = NOW() WHERE employee_number = #{item.employeeNumber}
